page: Vultr vbm-256c-2048gb-8-mi300x-gpu is a bare metal server configured with dual AMD EPYC 9534 processors, delivering 128 physical cores and 256 vCPUs at a base frequency of 2.45 GHz. The architecture is x86_64 with dedicated CPU allocation. System memory totals 2048.0 GB, providing 8.0 GB of RAM per physical core.

The server features eight AMD MI300X GPUs based on the CDNA3 architecture, offering a combined total of 1536 GB of high-bandwidth VRAM. Local storage consists of 28608 GB of NVMe SSD capacity, which supports high-throughput data access directly on the bare metal instance. One complimentary public IPv4 address is included.

This bare metal configuration represents a high-density resource profile, combining massive GPU memory capacity with substantial local NVMe storage. This density reduces the need for multi-node clustering for large-scale models, optimizing cost efficiency relative to multi-server deployments. The hardware is designed for large language model training, high-performance computing, large-scale data science jobs, and massive database workloads.
description: Vultr vbm-256c-2048gb-8-mi300x-gpu is a bare metal server featuring 256 vCPUs across 128 physical AMD EPYC 9534 cores operating at 2.45 GHz. The system is equipped with 2048.0 GB of RAM, providing 8.0 GB per core. Acceleration is driven by eight AMD MI300X GPUs on the CDNA3 architecture, delivering a total of 1536 GB of VRAM. Storage is provided by 28608 GB of local NVMe SSDs, and the server includes one complimentary public IPv4 address. This high-density hardware profile is designed to handle large-scale parallel processing without the overhead of virtualization. The massive GPU memory and local storage capacity make this server suitable for large language model training, deep learning, data science pipelines, and high-performance computing workloads.

tagline: A bare metal accelerator platform featuring eight AMD MI300X GPUs, 2048 GB RAM, and 28.6 TB of local NVMe storage.
bullet_points: 256 dedicated vCPUs via AMD EPYC 9534 processors
Eight AMD MI300X CDNA3 GPUs with 1536 GB total VRAM
2048 GB of system memory at 8 GB per core
28608 GB of high-speed local NVMe SSD storage
Designed for large language model training and data science
